title: FollowFirmnessT Property
description:
This property sets the firmness in relation to the force control function for torque in the

following direction during the execution of the force guide object.

The larger the FollowFirmnessT value, the stronger the force control function for torque

becomes in the following direction. This slows response to changes in torque, but reduces

vibration.

The smaller the FollowFirmnessT value, the weaker the force control function for torque

becomes in the following direction. This speeds up response to changes in torque, but increases vibration.
